data.title: Result of AngloGold Ashanti plc's General Meeting
data.description: AngloGold Ashanti plc disclosed the outcome of its recent shareholder meeting, conducted on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 9:00 am (Mountain Daylight Time). The resolution proposed during this meeting can be found in the notice of the General Meeting released on July 1, 2026. This multinational company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AU and on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange as ANG. Shareholders were informed of this important update following the meeting. Additional details can be accessed on the company's official website: www.anglogoldashan.

data.title: BPI in the Philippines to launch stablecoin project for quicker, cheaper international payments to Filipino workers.
data.description: A bank in the Philippines is planning a trial for a stablecoin settlement system aimed at expediting and lowering the expenses of international payments for Filipino remote workers. This initiative seeks to enhance the efficiency and affordability of transferring funds abroad for Filipinos.

data.title: Publishing of Suominen’s Half-Year Financial Report January–June 2026 on August 7, 2026
data.description: On Friday, August 7, 2026, Suominen Corporation is set to release its Half-Year Financial Report covering the period from January 1 to June 30, 2026, at around 9:00 a.m.

data.title: Serina Therapeutics to Participate in the BTIG Virtual Biotechnology Conference
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Serina Therapeutics, Inc. revealed its participation in the BTIG Virtual Biotechnology Conference on July 28-29, 2026. Serina, traded as SER on NYSE American, is a Huntsville-based biotech firm focused on advancing their POZ Platform™ drug optimization technology. This event allows the company's management to engage with industry experts and investors.

data.title: Ragnarok Origin Classic Officially Launched in North, Central and South America  on July 23, 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, GRAVITY Co., Ltd. unveiled Ragnarok Origin Classic, an MMORPG game, in North, Central, and South America through its subsidiary in Hong Kong. The game launch by the developer and publisher of online and mobile games marked a significant move in the gaming industry. With GRAVITY Game Vision, Ltd. leading the release, players in the Americas can now experience the Mobile and PC game. This development signifies the company's commitment to expanding its global presence.

data.title: Coforge Secures a $230+ Million Five-Year Contract with a European Client
data.description: A significant deal was revealed today by Coforge, headquartered in Princeton, NJ, and based in Greater Noida, India. The contract spans five years and is worth more than $230 million, focusing on utilizing artificial intelligence for a transformation project with a key European client.

data.title: NETSCOUT Strengthens Operational Resilience of Critical Infrastructure Against AI-Driven, Internet-Scale DDoS Attacks
data.description: A technology company based in Westford, Mass, NETSCOUT® (NASDAQ: NTCT), has revealed plans to enhance its Arbor® Cloud DDoS attack protection capacity by doubling it to 33 Tbps. This investment is intended to ensure uninterrupted access to crucial digital services amidst DDoS attacks, safeguard revenue-generating operations, assist AI-driven businesses that operate constantly, and preserve customer satisfaction.
